steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content:
Sentence 1: contour and box modeling process thousands of shapes.

Sentence 2 (after blank): these methods are more economical than surface model methods, which need millions of polygons.

Sentence 2 is a consequence of sentence 1 — fewer shapes → cheaper.

steps.title: Pick the transition
steps.content:
As such signals consequence/result, which fits cleanly. Instead implies contrast (wrong). Specifically would introduce a detail/example (wrong). For example would introduce an instance (wrong).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
